rationale: Section 11.1826 governs audit and reporting requirements for organizations claiming low-income and moderate-income housing exemptions under Sections 11.1825 and 11.182. It does not address the residence homestead exemption under Section 11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 11.1826. MONITORING OF COMPLIANCE WITH LOW-INCOME AND MODERATE-INCOME HOUSING EXEMPTIONS.
_note: No conflict: §11.1826 concerns §11.1825/§11.182 exemptions, not the §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption.
